nasb.text: And behold, at that moment three men appeared at the house in which we were staying, having been sent to me from Caesarea.

esv.text: And behold, at that very moment three men arrived at the house in which we were, sent to me from Caesarea.

cnv.text: 就在那個時候，有三個從該撒利亞派到我這裡來的人，站在我住的房子門前。

ccb.text: 就在那时候，有三个从凯撒利亚来的人到我住处的门口来找我。

csbs.text: 正在这时，忽然有三个人站在我们所住的房子面前，他们是从凯撒里亚被派到我这里的。
